parameters.content:
## Email Finder V3 — Company Orchestrator
**Trigger:** POST /webhook/wf-email-finder-v3

**Input:** `{ company_id?, company_name?, ico?, domain?, website? }` — at least one required

**Flow:**
1. Clean domain (Execute sub-clean-domain)
2. Resolve company: has domain → lookup/create in DB; no domain → ARES/firmy.cz fallback
3. Fetch all contacts for company
4. For each contact: generate email patterns → SMTP check → probe if catch-all → upsert to email_candidates
5. Website scrape for backup emails → upsert to email_candidates (source=website_scrape)
6. Return all results

**Sub-workflows:** sub-clean-domain (Execute), sub-smtp-check (Execute), sub-burner-probe (HTTP webhook)

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ company_name: $json.company_name || $json.domain, domain: $json.domain, ico: $json.ico || null, website: 'https://' + $json.domain, master_status: 'new' }) }}

nodes.name: IF Has ICO or Legal Name

parameters.jsCode:
const prev = $input.item.json;
return { json: { error: 'Nepodařilo se najít doménu firmy. Zkuste zadat doménu ručně.', steps: prev.steps } };

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ company_name: $json.company_name || $json.domain, domain: $json.domain, ico: $json.ico || null, website: 'https://' + $json.domain, master_status: 'new' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify(($json._jednatels_to_create || []).map(function(j) { return { company_id: $json.company_id, full_name: j.full_name, notes: j.role || 'jednatel' }; })) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const prev = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { domain: prev.domain, candidates: prev.candidates.map(function(c) { return c.email; }) } }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify(($json.candidates || []).map(function(c) { return { contact_id: $json.contact_id, email_address: c.email, is_verified: c.status === 'valid', qev_status: c.status === 'valid' ? 'valid' : (c.status === 'invalid' ? 'invalid' : 'pending'), source: 'combo_generation' }; })) }}
={{ JSON.stringify(($json.backup_emails || []).map(function(e) { return { email_address: e.email, source: 'website_scrape', is_verified: false, qev_status: 'pending' }; })) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const prev = $('Process Kurzy Response').first().json;
return { json: { lead_id: '', company_id: prev.company_id || '', company_name: prev.company_name || '', ico: prev.ico || '' } };
